rulings.Case Title: LISA COLE VS. LEYDA HIJAZI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Lisa Cole'S Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents, Verified Responses To Discovery, Answers To Deposition Questions And Other Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday June 15, 2016, line 6. Plaintiff Lisa Cole'S Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents, Verified Responses To Discovery, Answers To Deposition Questions And Other Discovery And Request For Sanctions Granted in part and Denied in part. Motion is GRANTED as follows: (1) By June 29, 2016 Defendant Leyda Hijazi shall supplement RFPD Nos. 9, 12-14, 26, and 30 to state that a thorough search has been made and all responsive documents have been produced; (2) by June 29, 2016 Defendant Leyda Hijazi shall supplement RFPD No. 48 and produce any inspection or disclosure real estate documents from the date Defendants purchased the property through the date escrow closed. Any sensitive financial information may be redacted; (3) Defendant Leyda Hijazi shall answer the questions she was instructed not to answer at the deposition. Plaintiff shall have two additional hours of examination time for Ms. Hijazi. Deposition to occur no later than July 15, 2016 unless mutually agreed on a different date. Motion is DENIED as follows: (1) motion to compel further responses to the RFA's; and (2) Request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL ZINCHIK VS. DOUG WOLENS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday June 15, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT DOUG WOLENS, KATHERINE LAMONT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach a written contract executed on June 13, 2016 as alleged in paragraphs 6(a) or to allege that Plaintiff is not in possession of the written contract in paragraph 6(f). Plaintiff shall further support or delete allegations in paragraph 10. Demurer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. JUANA AGUILAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Continue Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday June 15, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT JUANA AGUILAR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and moot. This action was set for jury trial at 8:27 a.m. on June 9, 2016, i.e. 3 hours prior to the filing of the Notice of Motion. = (501/REQ)
